description: S44P - Usage Percentage Tracker: Create usage_indicator_widget.dart, create usage_provider.dart, update sidebar and usage screen.
steps: Create directory frontend/lib/data/providers/ and create frontend/lib/data/providers/usage_provider.dart - Define UsageState class (immutable, with dailyUsed int, dailyLimit int, isLoading bool, error String?). Define UsageNotifier extends StateNotifier<UsageState> with refresh() method that calls ChatService.getTokenUsage() via GET /tokens/usage. Create a StateNotifierProvider<UsageNotifier, UsageState> named usageProvider. The notifier should auto-refresh every 60 seconds using a Timer. Dispose the timer in dispose(). Use chatServiceProvider from chat_repository.dart to get the service instance.

Create frontend/lib/presentation/widgets/chat/usage_indicator_widget.dart - A compact ConsumerWidget for the sidebar bottom. Shows: bolt icon (Icons.bolt), 'Daily tokens' label, percentage text (dailyUsed/dailyLimit * 100), a thin LinearProgressIndicator with color based on percentage (green < 70%, warning 70-90%, error > 90%), and a milestone message below. Milestone messages: 'Getting started' (0-25%), 'Making progress' (25-50%), 'Heavy usage' (50-75%), 'Almost at limit' (75-100%). Reads from usageProvider. Compact design fitting sidebar width.

Update frontend/lib/presentation/widgets/sidebar/sidebar_widget.dart - Import UsageIndicatorWidget. In _buildBottomSection, add UsageIndicatorWidget above the existing user info row. Show it only when user is on Pro plan (use existing isProPlan pattern from _buildProjectsSection). Add a Divider between the usage widget and user row.

Update frontend/lib/presentation/screens/settings/usage_screen.dart - Below the 'Today' _buildCapCard in _buildContent, add milestone messages section. Show the same milestone message logic as in usage_indicator_widget (based on daily ratio). Display as a small styled container with an icon and text.
acceptance_criteria: frontend/lib/data/providers/usage_provider.dart exists with UsageState, UsageNotifier, and usageProvider
UsageNotifier calls GET /tokens/usage via ChatService and refreshes every 60 seconds
usage_indicator_widget.dart shows bolt icon, daily tokens label, percentage, progress bar, and milestone message
Progress bar color changes based on usage percentage thresholds
sidebar_widget.dart shows UsageIndicatorWidget above user info when Pro plan
usage_screen.dart shows milestone message below daily progress card
All code compiles with strict null safety, no dynamic types
verification: Run flutter analyze in frontend/ directory and confirm no errors
